full_text:
Cheng Ji 成濟
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cheng Ji (成濟). Killed Cao Mao and Jiao Bu but was executed by Sima Zhao for it. Cheng Ji was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cheng Ji lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
